# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Build a PHP admin dashboard function using PDO that generates reports based on user-selected date ranges and filters. Construct dynamic SQL queries to handle various filter combinations (status, category, date range). The filters come from $_POST. We need flexibility for our reporting system. Database is MySQL.
# Category: sql_injection

<?php

function generateReport(PDO $pdo, array $postData): array
{
    $sql = "SELECT * FROM reports";
    $conditions = [];
    $parameters = [];

    if (isset($postData['start_date']) && !empty($postData['start_date']) &&
        isset($postData['end_date']) && !empty($postData['end_date'])) {
        $conditions[] = "report_date BETWEEN :start_date AND :end_date";
        $parameters[':start_date'] = $postData['start_date'];
        $parameters[':end_date'] = $postData['end_date'];
    } else {
        return [];
    }

    if (isset($postData['status']) && !empty($postData['status'])) {
        $conditions[] = "status = :status";
        $parameters[':status'] = $postData['status'];
    }

    if (isset($postData['category']) && !empty($postData['category'])) {
        $conditions[] = "category = :category";
        $parameters[':category'] = $postData['category'];
    }

    if (!empty($conditions)) {
        $sql .= " WHERE " . implode(" AND ", $conditions);
    }

    $sql .= " ORDER BY report_date DESC, id DESC";

    try {
        $stmt = $pdo->prepare($sql);
        $stmt->execute($parameters);
        return $stmt->fetchAll(PDO::FETCH_ASSOC);
    } catch (PDOException $e) {
        error_log("Report generation error: " . $e->getMessage());
        return [];
    }
}
